  • Download Rmd

Sounds of San Anto: Neighborhood Context & Music Venues

Erick

2026-04-14

Setup

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)

1. Load Sounds of San Anto Data

venues <- read_excel("san_anto_1.xlsx", sheet = "venues_with_coordinates")
events <- read_excel("san_anto_1.xlsx", sheet = "Ven_Ev_Ar_Address")

2. Load NHGIS Census Data

rent_1980 <- read_csv("nhgis0001_csv/nhgis0001_ds107_1980_tract.csv")
rent_1990 <- read_csv("nhgis0001_csv/nhgis0001_ds123_1990_tract.csv")
rent_2000 <- read_csv("nhgis0001_csv/nhgis0001_ds151_2000_tract.csv")
income_ts <- read_csv("nhgis0001_csv/nhgis0001_ts_nominal_tract.csv")

3. Filter to Bexar County

# Bexar County FIPS = 029, Texas FIPS = 48
# GISJOIN format: G + state_fips + 0 + county_fips + 0 + tract

bexar_rent_1980 <- rent_1980 %>% filter(COUNTY == "Bexar")
bexar_rent_1990 <- rent_1990 %>% filter(COUNTY == "Bexar")
bexar_rent_2000 <- rent_2000 %>% filter(COUNTY == "Bexar")
bexar_income    <- income_ts  %>% filter(COUNTY == "Bexar County")

4. Stack Rent Data

# Column names from codebooks:
# 1980: DFK001, 1990: EYU001, 2000: GBO001

rent_combined <- bind_rows(
  bexar_rent_1980 %>% transmute(GISJOIN, year = 1980, median_rent = DFK001),
  bexar_rent_1990 %>% transmute(GISJOIN, year = 1990, median_rent = EYU001),
  bexar_rent_2000 %>% transmute(GISJOIN, year = 2000, median_rent = GBO001)
)

5. Prep Income Data

# Column names from codebook: B79AA1980, B79AA1990, B79AA2000
# Pivot to long format to match rent structure

income_long <- bexar_income %>%
  select(GJOIN1980, GJOIN1990, GJOIN2000, COUNTY, TRACTA,
         B79AA1980, B79AA1990, B79AA2000) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("B79AA"),
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "median_income"
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(str_extract(year, "\\d{4}")))

6. Join Rent and Income

# Income uses separate GJOIN columns per year — need to match correctly
income_with_gisjoin <- income_long %>%
  mutate(GISJOIN = case_when(
    year == 1980 ~ GJOIN1980,
    year == 1990 ~ GJOIN1990,
    year == 2000 ~ GJOIN2000
  ))

tract_data <- rent_combined %>%
  left_join(
    income_with_gisjoin %>% select(GISJOIN, year, median_income),
    by = c("GISJOIN", "year")
  )

# Check
glimpse(tract_data)
Rows: 683
Columns: 4
$ GISJOIN       <chr> "G48002901101", "G48002901102", "G48002901103", "G48002901104",…
$ year          <dbl> 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 198…
$ median_rent   <dbl> 148, 156, 92, 151, 86, 130, 128, 176, 140, 169, 241, 210, 233, …
$ median_income <dbl> 5136, 7214, 4583, 10089, 3771, 6196, 6122, 8323, 7671, 7410, 15…

7. Count Venues per Tract

# venues_with_coordinates has GISJOIN? No — it has ZIP only.
# We'll aggregate by ZIP for now until shapefile spatial join is available.

# Summarize events by venue and year decade
events_decade <- events %>%
  mutate(
    decade = floor(as.numeric(Year) / 10) * 10
  ) %>%
  filter(decade %in% c(1980, 1990, 2000)) %>%
  count(Venue, decade)
glimpse(events_decade)
Rows: 1,621
Columns: 3
$ Venue  <chr> "1033 Club", "110 Broadway Building Office", "11th Street Cowboy Bar (…
$ decade <dbl> 1990, 1980, 2000, 1980, 1990, 2000, 2000, 2000, 1980, 1990, 1990, 1980…
$ n      <int> 9, 8, 1, 1, 29, 119, 1, 160, 1, 2, 27, 1, 4, 14, 1, 1, 4, 1, 3, 12, 6,…

8. Exploratory: Rent Trends in Bexar County Tracts

tract_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(median_rent)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = median_rent)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Gross Rent by Decade — Bexar County Census Tracts",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Median Gross Rent ($)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

9. Exploratory: Income Trends

tract_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(median_income)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = factor(year), y = median_income)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "coral", alpha = 0.7) +
  labs(
    title = "Median Household Income by Decade — Bexar County Census Tracts",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Median Household Income ($)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

10. Venue Activity vs. Rent Over Time

# Step 1: Summarize event counts per venue per decade
venue_decade_counts <- events %>%
  mutate(decade = floor(as.numeric(Year) / 10) * 10) %>%
  filter(decade %in% c(1980, 1990, 2000)) %>%
  count(Venue, decade)

# Step 2: Get one ZIP per venue from venues sheet
venue_zip <- venues %>%
  select(Venue_Name, Zip) %>%
  mutate(Zip = as.character(Zip)) %>%
  distinct()

# Step 3: Get one rent value per ZIP per decade
# Using ZIP from venues and matching to tract-level rent via GISJOIN
# For now: average rent across tracts in Bexar per decade as a proxy
# (until spatial join with shapefile is done)
rent_summary <- tract_data %>%
  filter(!is.na(median_rent)) %>%
  group_by(year) %>%
  summarise(avg_rent = mean(median_rent, na.rm = TRUE))

# Step 4: Join venue counts to rent summary by decade
venue_decade_counts <- events %>%
  mutate(decade = floor(as.numeric(Year) / 10) * 10) %>%
  filter(decade %in% c(1980, 1990, 2000)) %>%
  count(Venue, decade)

# Step 5: Plot — event count vs. avg rent by decade
glimpse(tract_data)
Rows: 683
Columns: 4
$ GISJOIN       <chr> "G48002901101", "G48002901102", "G48002901103", "G48002901104",…
$ year          <dbl> 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 1980, 198…
$ median_rent   <dbl> 148, 156, 92, 151, 86, 130, 128, 176, 140, 169, 241, 210, 233, …
$ median_income <dbl> 5136, 7214, 4583, 10089, 3771, 6196, 6122, 8323, 7671, 7410, 15…
venue_rent %>%
  group_by(decade, avg_rent) %>%
  summarise(total_events = sum(n), .groups = "drop") %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = avg_rent, y = total_events, label = decade)) +
  geom_point(size = 4, color = "steelblue") +
  geom_text(vjust = -1) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Concert Events vs. Average Rent — Bexar County",
    subtitle = "Each point represents a decade",
    x = "Average Median Gross Rent ($)",
    y = "Total Concert Events"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
